validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation is minimal and leverages existing Coach infrastructure by simply updating the profile configuration. Unit tests are comprehensive.
edge_cases_covered: Tasks creating only test infrastructure (conftest.py) do not block via zero_test_blocking=False
Verification of the TESTING profile via unit tests

criteria_verification.notes: Verified that DEFAULT_PROFILES[TaskType.TESTING] now has tests_required=True.
The Coach's validate() method invokes run_independent_tests() when tests_required=True, which is now active for TESTING tasks.
IndependentTestResult provides raw_output and summaries which the Coach uses to generate actionable feedback.
Verified zero_test_blocking=False in the TESTING profile.
zero_test_blocking=False ensures that tasks without executable test files (e.g. conftest.py only) do not cause a validation failure.
tests/unit/test_task_types.py was updated to verify the TESTING profile and all tests passed.

rationale: The Player correctly updated the task profiles to enable independent test execution for testing tasks while ensuring that infrastructure-only tasks are not blocked. The changes are fully verified by unit tests.
